across.clue: To make someone or something show a quality that they have; to produce a new product. | ___ out
Hunger is the feeling that you get when you need to eat.
To detach means to separate from something.
Exclusion is the act of keeping someone out of a group.
To exaggerate is to say that something is bigger or better than it really is.
An asset is a skill or quality that is useful or valuable.
When someone is envious, they want something that another person has.
a period of time between two events.
A doctrine is a set of beliefs held by a group.

down.clue: A bruise is a dark mark caused by being hit by something.
A domain is an area of knowledge or activity.
If something is frequent, then it happens or is done often.
An orchestra is a large group of musicians playing together.
the period of time during which something continues to happen or exist.
Fahrenheit is a temperature scale where water freezes at 32° and boils at 212°.
A greenhouse is a small glass building that is used to grow plants.
To get rid of something that is not wanted or needed
A landlord is a man who rents property to a person.
an area where there are many houses usually built at the same time by the same company.
When it is humid, there is a lot of water in the air.
